notes: Credential-free default behavior for gameplay, tests, scorecards, and deterministic reviews.

personas.description: Reads state carefully, prioritizes survivability, and judges fairness and tactical depth from trace evidence.
Plays plausibly but may miss tactical detail; focuses on whether items, enemies, and actions are understandable.
Probes edge cases, invalid actions, ABORTED paths, and thin renders to surface protocol and harness failures.
